description_long: This is a modern laptop with a silver metallic body and a black keyboard, featuring a large display screen that is currently open and powered on. The screen displays the Windows 10 operating system desktop, with several application icons and a blue wallpaper. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a touchpad below it, all set within a sleek, rectangular chassis. The laptop's lid and base are joined by a central hinge, allowing the screen to be opened and closed. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, cafes, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, silver laptop with a black keyboard and an open, powered-on screen displaying the Windows 10 desktop. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible logos or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Windows 10 desktop and the full keyboard layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the laptop and the open hinge, with the keyboard and screen edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the screen and the plain, logo-free lid.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, focusing on the keyboard and the open screen from a different perspective.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop with icons and wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, standard English keys.
